description: A cozy lofi aesthetic with human characters, intimate spaces, warm lighting
image_prompt_template: Lofi art style illustration. A peaceful scene with {mood}. Warm color palette, soft lighting, gentle shadows. Human character in a comfortable, intimate setting. Detailed background with cozy elements. High quality, digital art, aesthetic illustration.
video_prompt_template: Lofi animation style video. A peaceful scene with {mood}. Warm color palette, soft lighting, gentle shadows. Human character in a comfortable setting with subtle motion. Cinematic still shot, locked perspective, zero camera movement. Gentle character movements, ambient details shifting slowly. Detailed background, cozy elements. Smooth animation, aesthetic lofi vibe, 30 second duration. Negative: panning, zooming, drone, walking, motion blur, tracking, dolly.
